briefdescription.para: < Macros to enable /disable support of NIST P-384 curve

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvTyp)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGetCrvData

briefdescription.para: This function gets the curve related information.

parameterdescription.para: Type of the elliptic curve

listitem.para: Crv Curve information
Get the curve data

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, XSecure_ElliptcPrivateKeyGen *PrivateKey)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticPrvtKeyGenerate

briefdescription.para: This function generates 48-byte key for P-384 curve using TRNG.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the type of the ECC curve.
is the pointer to XSecure_ElliptcPrivateKeyGen

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM - If any input parameter is invalid
XST_FAILURE - On failure

simplesect.para: This API expects TRNG HW to be in HEALTHY state, This can be achieved by running preoperational health tests.

listitem.para: The random ephimeral/Private key should be between 1 to ecc order of the curve. EK can be obtained by using mod operation over 384-bits random number. However to reduce bias associated with mod operation, standard recommends of using additional 64-bits i.e. 384 + 64 = 448-bits. Third-Party library has option to perform 448-bit mod operation however it treats MSB as sign bit. So to overcome the issue, new function added to third-party library uses next available large number operation that hardware can handle is selected, 480-bits (60 bytes). Below code takes 448 bits from random number generated remaining MSB bits are set to 0x00.
Take ECDSA core out if reset
Third-Party library expects MSB bit to be 0 always

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, u32 EphemeralKeyAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGenerateEphemeralKey

briefdescription.para: This function generates 48-byte ephemeral key for P-384 curve using TRNG.

parameterdescription.para: Specifies the type of the ECC curve.
Address of ephemeral key

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM - If any input parameter is invalid
XST_FAILURE - On failure

simplesect.para: This API expects TRNG HW to be in HEALTHY state, This can be achieved by running preoperational health tests.

listitem.para: Take ECDSA core out if reset
Third-Party library expects MSB bit to be 0 always

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, const u8 *Hash, u32 HashLen, u8 *PrvtKey, u8 *Signature)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGenEphemeralNSign

briefdescription.para: This function generates the signature on provided hash using ecc.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the type of the ECC curve.
is the pointer to the hash of the data to be signed
is the length of the hash.
is the pointer to ECC private key.
is the pointer to the buffer where the ECC signature shall be stored.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM - If any input parameter is invalid
XST_FAILURE - On failure
Generate Ephemeral Key using TRNG for generating ECDSA signature
Generate Signature using Private Key to the provided hash
Clear ephemeral key and private key

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, u64 PrvtKeyAddr, u64 PubKeyAddr, u64 SharedSecretAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EcdhGetSecret

briefdescription.para: This is a wrapper function which calls the third-party API to perform ECDH and generate shared secret.

parameterdescription.para: Curve Type of the keys used to generate shared secret
64-bit address of the private key
64-bit address of public key
64-bit address of buffer for storing shared secret

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM - If any input parameter is invalid
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_NON_SUPPORTED_CRV - If elliptic curve data received is NULL
XST_FAILURE - On failure

simplesect.para: Shared secret is calculated by performing scalar multiplication on public key and private key provided as input.

listitem.para: Zeroize local copy of key
Zeroize local copy of shared secret

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_GenSharedSecret

briefdescription.para: This function handler extracts the payload params with respect to XSECURE_API_GEN_SHARED_SECRET IPI command and calls XSecure_EcdhGetSecret server API to generate the shared secret using ECDH.

parameterdescription.para: Lower 32 bit address of the EcdhParams structure from client
Upper 32 bit address of the EcdhParams structure from client

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On Success
XST_FAILURE - On failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 ParamsSize)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticPrivateKeyGen

briefdescription.para: This function performs Elliptic private key generation.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_EccPrivateKeyParams structure.
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_EccPrivateKeyParams structure.
Size in bytes of the XSecure_EccPrivateKeyParams structure as reported by the client.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On Success.
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM If ParamsSize is invalid.
XST_FAILURE On failure.
Validate the size passed by the client matches the expected parameter structure size and is 8-byte aligned
Validate that the private key length reported by the client matches the only currently supported ECC P-384 key size
Validate output address for the generated private key using the client-provided private key length
Copy the generated private key from the local buffer to the client-supplied 64-bit destination address
Securely zeroize Seed and PersString to prevent key-generation entropy from lingering on stack
Securely zeroize the local private key buffer to prevent the generated key from lingering on stack after the operation

memberdef.argsstring: (XPlmi_Cmd *Cmd)
memberdef.name: XSecure_PlatEllipticIpiHandler

briefdescription.para: This function calls respective IPI handler based on the API_ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the handler execution is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If any parameter is invalid.
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, EcdsaCrvInfo **Crv)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticValidateAndGetCrvInfo

briefdescription.para: This function validates and gets curve info and curve size in bytes.

parameterdescription.para: Is a type of elliptic curve
Pointer to EcdsaCrvInfo

listitem.para: CrvSize Size of curve in bytes

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, const u64 DAddr, const XSecure_EllipticKeyAddr *KeyAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGenerateKey_64Bit

briefdescription.para: This function generates Public Key for a given curve type using private key where both keys located at 64 bit address.

parameterdescription.para: Is a type of elliptic curve
Address of static private key
Pointer to public key address

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_NON_SUPPORTED_CRV - When elliptic Curve is not supported
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid argument
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_GEN_KEY_ERR - Error in generating Public key
Store Priv key to local buffer
Place the hardware core into the reset
Generate public key with provided private key and curve type
Store key to destination address

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, const u8 *D, const XSecure_EllipticKey *Key)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGenerateKey

briefdescription.para: This function generates Public Key for a given curve type.

parameterdescription.para: Is a type of elliptic curve
Pointer to static private key
Pointer to public key

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_NON_SUPPORTED_CRV - When elliptic Curve is not supported
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid argument
Generate public key with provided private key and curve type

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, const XSecure_EllipticHashData *HashInfo, const u64 DAddr, const u64 KAddr, const XSecure_EllipticSignAddr *SignAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGenerateSignature_64Bit

briefdescription.para: This function generates signature for a given hash and curve type where data is located at 64-bit address.

parameterdescription.para: Type of elliptic curve
Pointer to Hash Data i.e. Hash Address and length
Address of the static private key
Ephemeral private key
Pointer to signature address

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid argument
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_NON_SUPPORTED_CRV - If curve data pointer is NULL
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_GEN_SIGN_BAD_RAND_NUM - When Bad random number used for sign generation
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_GEN_SIGN_INCORRECT_HASH_LEN Incorrect hash length for sign generation
XST_FAILURE - On any other failures

simplesect.para: K, the ephemeral private key, shall be an unpredictable (cryptographically secure) random number unique for each signature Note that reuse or external predictability of this number generally breaks the security of ECDSA

listitem.para: Store Hash,D,K to local buffers
Generate signature with provided hash, private key, ephemeral key and curve type.
Store Sign to destination address
Zeroize local key copy

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, const u8 *Hash, const u32 HashLen, const u8 *D, const u8 *K, const XSecure_EllipticSign *Sign)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGenerateSignature

briefdescription.para: This function generates signature for a given hash and curve type.

parameterdescription.para: Type of elliptic curve
Pointer to the hash for which sign has to be generated
Length of the hash in bytes
Pointer to the static private key
Ephemeral private key
Pointer to the signature

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid argument

simplesect.para: K, the ephemeral private key, shall be an unpredictable (cryptographically secure) random number unique for each signature Note that reuse or external predictability of this number generally breaks the security of ECDSA

listitem.para: Generate signature with provided hash, private key, ephemeral key and curve type

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, const XSecure_EllipticKeyAddr *KeyAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticValidateKey_64Bit

briefdescription.para: This function validates the public key for a given curve type where key is located at 64-bit address.

parameterdescription.para: Type of elliptic curve
Pointer to public key address

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid argument
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_NON_SUPPORTED_CRV - If curve data pointer is NULL
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_KEY_ZERO - When Public key is zero
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_KEY_WRONG_ORDER Wrong order of Public key
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_KEY_NOT_ON_CRV - When Key is not found on the curve
XST_FAILURE - On any other failures
Store Pub key(Qx,Qy) to local buffer
Validate the public key for a given curve type

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, const XSecure_EllipticKey *Key)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticValidateKey

briefdescription.para: This function validates the public key for a given curve type.

parameterdescription.para: Type of elliptic curve
Pointer to the public key

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid argument
Validate the public key for a given curve type

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, const XSecure_EllipticHashData *HashInfo, const XSecure_EllipticKeyAddr *KeyAddr, const XSecure_EllipticSignAddr *SignAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticVerifySign_64Bit

briefdescription.para: This function verifies the signature for a given hash, key and curve type where data is located at 64-bit address.

parameterdescription.para: Type of elliptic curve
Pointer to Hash Data i.e. Hash Address and length
Pointer to public key address
Pointer to signature address

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid argument
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_NON_SUPPORTED_CRV - If curve data pointer is NULL
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_BAD_SIGN - When signature provided for verification is bad
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_VER_SIGN_INCORRECT_HASH_LEN Incorrect hash length for sign verification
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_VER_SIGN_R_ZERO R set to zero
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_VER_SIGN_S_ZERO S set to zero
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_VER_SIGN_R_ORDER_ERROR R is not within ECC order
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_VER_SIGN_S_ORDER_ERROR S is not within ECC order
XST_FAILURE - On any other failures
Store Pub key(Qx,Qy) and Sign(SignR, SignS) to local buffers
Store Hash to local buffer
Verify signature with provided hash, public key and curve type

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType, const u8 *Hash, const u32 HashLen, const XSecure_EllipticKey *Key, const XSecure_EllipticSign *Sign)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticVerifySign

briefdescription.para: This function verifies the signature for a given hash, key and curve type.

parameterdescription.para: Type of elliptic curve
Pointer to the hash for which sign has to be generated
Length of hash in bytes
Pointer to the public key
Pointer to the signature

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid argument
Verify signature with provided hash, public key and curve type

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 Size, u8 *Dst, const u64 SrcAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_PutData

briefdescription.para: This function copies data from 32/64 bit address to local buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Length of data in bytes
Pointer to the destination buffer
Source address

listitem.para: Copies data from provided address to local buffer based on the endianness configured

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 Size, const u8 *Src, const u64 DstAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_GetData

briefdescription.para: This function copies data to 32/64 bit address from local buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Length of data in bytes
Pointer to the source buffer
Destination address

listitem.para: Copies data to provided address from local buffer based on the endianness configured

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 Size, u64 DstAddr, const u64 SrcAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_FixEndiannessNCopy

briefdescription.para: This function copies data to destination based on library endianness selection.

para.verbatim: - Changes the endianness when library is operating in little endian - Copies data without changing any endianness when library is operating in big endain.

parameterdescription.para: Length of data in bytes
Address of the source buffer
Destination address

simplesect.para: This is the helper function to convert the endianness as required.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XSecure_EllipticCrvTyp CrvType)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGetCrvSize

briefdescription.para: This function gets curve size in bytes.

parameterdescription.para: Is a type of elliptic curve

listitem.para: CrvSize Size of curve in bytes
Get curve size

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 CurveType, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 DstAddrLow, u32 DstAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGenKey

briefdescription.para: This function handler extracts the payload params from the IPI command and calls XSecure_EllipticGenerateKey server API.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Is a type of elliptic curve
Lower 32 bit address of the static private key
Higher 32 bit address of the static private key
Lower 32 bit address of the public key to be stored
Higher 32 bit address of the public key to be stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the elliptic key generation is successful
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_NON_SUPPORTED_CRV - If curve size is 0
XST_FAILURE - On failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 DstAddrLow, u32 DstAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGenSign

briefdescription.para: This function handler extracts the payload params of the XSECURE_API_ELLIPTIC_GENERATE_SIGN IPI command and calls XSecure_EllipticGenerateSignature server API.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_EllipticSignGenParams structure
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_EllipticSignGenParams structure
Lower 32 bit address of the signature to be stored
Higher 32 bit address of the signature to be stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the elliptic sign generation is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If curve size is 0
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Validate internal address fields in the copied structure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 CurveType, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticValidatePubKey

briefdescription.para: This function handler extracts the payload params of XSECURE_API_ELLIPTIC_VALIDATE_KEY IPI command and calls XSecure_EllipticValidateKey server API.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Is a type of elliptic curve
Lower 32 bit address of the public key
Higher 32 bit address of the public key

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the elliptic key validation is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If curve size is 0
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticVerifySignature

briefdescription.para: This function handler extracts the payload params with respect to XSECURE_API_ELLIPTIC_VERIFY_SIGN IPI command and calls XSecure_EllipticGenerateKey server API.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_EllipticSignVerifyParams structure
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_EllipticSignVerifyParams structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the elliptic sign verify is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If curve size is 0
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Validate internal address fields in the copied structure
Verify the signature for the provided hash, key and curve type

memberdef.argsstring: (XPlmi_Cmd *Cmd)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticIpiHandler

briefdescription.para: This function calls respective IPI handler based on the API_ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the handler execution is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If Cmd is NULL or API ID is invalid
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Call the respective API handler according to API ID
XSecure_EllipticGenKey
XSecure_EllipticGenSign
XSecure_EllipticValidatePubKey
XSecure_EllipticVerifySignature

memberdef.argsstring: (void)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticCrvsGetCount

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the total number of curves supported.

listitem.para: Number of curves supported

briefdescription.para: Length of xilsecure ecc true random number generator.
ECC key generation seed buffer size in bytes.
ECC key generation seed and personalization string length.
Align ECDSA curve size in bytes.
Bits in bytes.
Size of NIST P-384 curve in bytes.
Size of NIST P-521 curve in bytes.
Size of NIST P-256 curve in bytes.
Size of NIST P-192 curve in bytes.
Size of NIST P-224 curve in bytes.
Size of NIST P-521 curve is 66 bytes.

detaileddescription.para: This macro is used to make the address word aligned

briefdescription.para: Operates APIs on little endian format.
Elliptic module major version.
Elliptic module minor version.
ECDH module major version.
ECDH module minor version.
Elliptic module major version.
Elliptic module minor version.
ECDH module major version.
ECDH module minor version.
Elliptic module major version.
Elliptic module minor version.
